changedLines.originalText: Drain, Justice, and Echo, YOLO make deck saves.
changedLines.cleanedText: Jrain, Justas, and Ekko, Eolo make deck saves.

changedLines.originalText: Justice, Polar Bear, and YOLO all make, Wisdom saving throws.
changedLines.cleanedText: Justas, Polar Bear, and Eolo all make, Wisdom saving throws.

changedLines.originalText: The two of you, who failed Echo and YOLO, you're both terrified of this guy.
changedLines.cleanedText: The two of you, who failed Ekko and Eolo, you're both terrified of this guy.

changedLines.originalText: Yolo, but then he roared again, and it's too scary. You too, Echo. He's terrifying.
changedLines.cleanedText: Eolo, but then he roared again, and it's too scary. You too, Ekko. He's terrifying.

changedLines.originalText: Yeah, heh… His turn is over. Drain, you're up.
changedLines.cleanedText: Yeah, heh… His turn is over. Jrain, you're up.

changedLines.originalText: This is the… this is the next… attack after… Justice, so you get…
changedLines.cleanedText: This is the… this is the next… attack after… Justas, so you get…

changedLines.originalText: And then Tim Finian's up.
changedLines.cleanedText: And then Tim Finnan's up.

changedLines.originalText: Justice. Thank you.
changedLines.cleanedText: Justas. Thank you.

changedLines.originalText: Yellow Europe.
changedLines.cleanedText: Eolo Europe.

changedLines.originalText: Justice, your turn.
changedLines.cleanedText: Justas, your turn.

changedLines.originalText: Huh. It's been a while. I have 3 hit points. It's been a long time since I've been, like, this badly hurt in a combat. This is, it's throwing me off a little. Oh, no, no, no. Justice has the perfect thing to say in this moment. He looks around, he just says.
changedLines.cleanedText: Huh. It's been a while. I have 3 hit points. It's been a long time since I've been, like, this badly hurt in a combat. This is, it's throwing me off a little. Oh, no, no, no. Justas has the perfect thing to say in this moment. He looks around, he just says.

changedLines.originalText: Body, right? And then it just… it, like, looks… it, like, stares YOLO in the eye.
changedLines.cleanedText: Body, right? And then it just… it, like, looks… it, like, stares Eolo in the eye.

changedLines.originalText: Echo.
changedLines.cleanedText: Ekko.

changedLines.originalText: YOLO!
changedLines.cleanedText: Eolo!
